# JPY Small Quarter Levels Reference Table

## Complete List of JPY Small Quarter Levels (50.00 to 300.00)

This is a static reference table of all JPY small quarter levels. The pattern repeats every 4 levels: .00, .25, .50, .75 (every 25 pips)

- 50.00, 50.25, 50.50, 50.75
- 51.00, 51.25, 51.50, 51.75

## Pattern Recognition

**JPY Small Quarter Level Endings:**
- .00, .25, .50, .75 (every 25 pips)
- Pattern repeats every 1.00 (100 pips)

**Relationship to Regular JPY Quarters:**
- Regular JPY quarters: .00, 2.50, 5.00, 7.50 (every 250 pips)
- Small JPY quarters: Every 25 pips, so 10 small quarters = 1 regular quarter spacing

**Usage Notes:**
- JPY small quarters provide finer institutional level granularity
- Useful for precise JPY pair entries and penny-level trading
- Pattern is always last digits: .00, .25, .50, .75
- Total levels: ~1000 levels from 50.00 to 300.00 (vs ~100 regular JPY quarters)
